case_title: PERFECTION AMERICAN DRAPERY CLEANERS VS KRUEGER DAVE DBA KRUEGER BROS et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $484.00 FILED BY PERFECTION AMERICAN DRAPERY CLEANERS AS TO DEFENDANT KRUEGER DAVE DBA KRUEGER BROS HUERTA ALICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT KRUEGER DAVE DBA KRUEGER BROS HUERTA ALICIA PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.(SETTLED) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KRUEGER DAVE DBA KRUEGER BROS HUERTA ALICIA HEARING SET FOR NOV-30-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HUERTA ALICIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERFECTION AMERICAN DRAPERY CLEANERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KRUEGER DAVE DBA KRUEGER BROS HUERTA ALICIA $484.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $554.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF NOV-30-1995, GRANTED
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KRUEGER DAVE DBA KRUEGER BROS
